response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software engineering experience, solid technical breadth, and notable community/workshop teaching activity. However, the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership tenure, no explicit developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure ownership at scale, and no mobile-platform ecosystem experience. The role requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years building developer tools as a primary focus, neither of which is clearly demonstrated.
strengths: 13+ years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong testing/TDD culture with workshops, Selenium course authorship, and a D-lang test runner (Trial) and assertion library
DevOps and tooling exposure: GitLab/CI setup, Docker, Artifactory, MCP code generators, agentic dev tooling
concerns: No documented people-management experience or direct reports (role requires 2+ years)
Developer-tools work is fragmented across side projects rather than 3+ years of dedicated dev-tools/build/test-infra ownership
No mobile-platform ecosystem leadership and no evidence of leading organizational change

key_factors.factor: Strong testing and developer-tooling community contributions
